privileged_info_summary: No privileged information metadata found. The task.json file contains no 'metadata' field, unlike other tasks in the same environment (e.g., add_gift_order_fields, add_product_variations, add_to_cart, architect_digital_products). The setup_task.sh script creates a Drupal Commerce order with three items: Sony WH-1000XM5 ($348.00), Logitech MX Master 3S ($99.99), and a Dell product ($1,249.99). The task also references a non-existent verify_task.py file in the task.json 'files' field.
